---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**

Describe the problem from the point of view of nonprofit staff or the
person submitting a request — not just the technical gap.

**Proposed solution**

What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**

Any other approaches you thought about.

**Safety considerations**

If this touches AI triage, staff authentication, or what data is collected,
say so — see [`docs/RESPONSIBLE_AI.md`](../../docs/RESPONSIBLE_AI.md).
